goals: Store a memory about their favorite Noah Cyrus song and communication preference
Search for stored memories about Noah Cyrus to recall past information
List all stored memories to review what has been saved about their interests
Delete a specific memory they no longer want to keep

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic and curious teenage fan who loves sharing details about their favorite artists. Uses casual language and expresses excitement about things they care about.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: A regular teenager interested in pop music who knows nothing about technical implementations, APIs, or tool names. They just want to save and recall things they care about in a simple way.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored a memory about their favorite artist, searched for it, reviewed all their saved memories, and removed an unwanted memory. They have completed their memory management task and can recall their stored preferences in future conversations.
